name: Aave
description: Aave is a large-scale onchain money market used for collateralized lending and borrowing.

name: Ethereum
description: Ethereum is the base network for ETH, the native asset used for gas, staking, and collateral across the EVM ecosystem.

name: BitGo
description: BitGo operates the WBTC custody and issuance stack used to bring BTC into EVM-compatible DeFi venues.

name: Coinbase
description: Coinbase issues cbBTC, a centralized BTC wrapper backed 1:1 by BTC held in Coinbase custody.

name: Hyperliquid
description: Hyperliquid operates an app-specific trading venue focused on perpetuals and exchange-style liquidity rather than decomposed fixed-income routes.

name: Chainlink
description: Chainlink is the oracle network behind LINK, a utility asset used across oracle, staking, and collateral contexts.

name: Lido
description: Lido issues liquid staking assets such as stETH, pairing validator and staking exposure with liquid wrapper risk.

name: Uniswap
description: Uniswap is the dominant AMM venue behind UNI, a governance asset with broad DeFi collateral utility.

name: Arbitrum
description: Arbitrum is an optimistic rollup network whose ARB token anchors governance for one of the main EVM execution layers.

name: Curve
description: Curve is a liquidity venue focused on efficient swaps, with CRV serving as a governance and incentive asset across the protocol.

name: Sky
description: Sky issues USDS and related savings products, pairing a stablecoin issuer surface with yield-bearing savings routes.

name: Circle
description: Circle issues USDC, a centralized dollar stablecoin with reserve and redemption risk rather than protocol yield exposure.

name: Threshold
description: Threshold powers tBTC, a decentralized BTC representation secured by a rotating threshold signer set rather than a single custodian.

name: Tether
description: Tether issues USDT, a centralized dollar stablecoin with reserve, banking, and redemption risk.

name: Ethena
description: Ethena issues USDe, a synthetic dollar backed by delta-hedged collateral and exchange risk.
